# Daily Report — 2026-05-14

## Task Completed
Added `get_user_by_email` tool: a dedicated lookup function that searches the `sys_user` table by email address. Supports exact match (default) and LIKE partial match via an `exact` parameter. Returns a normalised record with 14 standard user fields. Registered in `service_desk`, `system_administrator`, and `full` tool packages.

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1038
- Coverage: 91%
- All passing: yes

## Security
Pre-existing dependency CVEs in pyjwt, setuptools, urllib3, wheel — no new vulnerabilities introduced.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py` — imported `GetUserByEmailParams` + `get_user_by_email_tool`; added tool definition
- `config/tool_packages.yaml` — added `get_user_by_email` to service_desk, system_administrator, full packages
- `tests/test_get_user_by_email.py` — 9 new tests
